fundUse: 67% Construction of new facility/lab, 15% new rubber production line, 18% debt repayment & working capital.
analystInsight:
🚫 TIDAK SESUAI — BUKAN SHARIAH
Eckem Holdings tidak patuh Syariah. Walaupun IB M&A Securities (rekod bagus) dan ada ekspansi kilang yang menarik, skip terus bagi pelabur Shariah. Untuk pelabur konvensional: Grade B kerana M&A IB + industrial expansion focus.

✅ WORTH IT (GRADE B)
Sektor Tech (Hardware) adalah sektor terbaik 2026 — SEMICO (+50%) dan SkyeChip (+151%) dah buktikan. Tiada OFS, Shariah-compliant. Tapi IB masih TBA — ini risiko utama. Formula baru: apply kalau IB keluar Maybank/M&A/Alliance Islamic. Skip kalau IB Mercury/UOB/CIMB sole. Harga RM0.28 berpatutan untuk entry.

fundUse: Software Suite R&D, cloud infrastructure, and market expansion
analystInsight:
⚠️ AVOID / HIGH RISK (GRADE C)
Sektor O&G services sedang sejuk — retail masih trauma dengan OGX dan OGM. Ada OFS (36.4M shares) yang menambah tekanan jual. IB belum disahkan. Walaupun ada elemen robotik dan digital, market 2026 tidak hargai O&G-adjacent dengan baik. Risiko tinggi untuk open below atau flat. Skip kecuali IB Maybank/M&A dan OS cecah 80x+.

fundUse: Purchase of new machinery, facility upgrading, and business expansion
analystInsight:
⚠️ NEUTRAL / LOW PRIORITY (GRADE C)
ICT infrastructure adalah sektor "boring" — tiada momentum tema besar seperti AI, semiconductor, atau data center. Tiada OFS, Shariah OK, harga murah RM0.20. Tapi IB TBA dan sektor ini jarang deliver listing day pop yang besar. Based on 2026 data, Industrial/ICT tanpa strong IB = avg +3-5% je. Boleh apply tapi jangan harap besar. Low conviction.

fundUse: IT support service expansion, system integration upgrades, working capital
analystInsight:
❌ AVOID (GRADE C — DOUBLE RED FLAG)
Dua sebab utama untuk skip:
1️⃣ OFS besar (47.34M shares) — historical data tunjuk OFS = avg -1.4% vs Non-OFS +21.2%
2️⃣ IT Services sektor biasa — bukan tech momentum, bukan industrial expansion
Walaupun Shariah-compliant, profil ini hampir sama dengan OGX (110x OS, ada OFS, result flat). Jangan apply.

fundUse: Expansion in Malaysia & Singapore, storage capacity, medical aesthetics
analystInsight:
✅ WORTH IT (GRADE B)
Main Market listing backed by Top Tier IB (RHB). Expansion plans are solid. However, beauty sector is not a high-momentum theme.

fundUse: Construction of new production facility & procurement of machines
analystInsight:
⚠️ AVOID
Potential 'Inspace' trap. Low trust in current ACE sentiment. Strategy: Avoid unless OS exceeds 100x.

OUTLIER PERFORMANCE: Despite a very low oversubscription of 3.23x (Grade C risk), the stock has defied expectations with a +47.5% surge. Likely driven by Public Bank's strong backing and low entry price.

🌟 MUST BUY
Global drone leader. High institutional demand expected for this tech unicorn listing.

fundUse: Debt repayment, new machinery, working capital
analystInsight: HISTORICAL OUTLIER: Massive performance pop that defied standard grading.

✅ WORTH IT
Regional unicorn listing. High branding awareness and strong retail interest expected.

✅ WORTH IT (VALUE PLAY)
Massive 70% valuation discount vs PENTA (46x P/E). At 14x P/E, this is an institutional favorite. 0.75 price is a retail filter, not a barrier. Target: RM0.95+.

✅ WORTH IT (GRADE B)
Listed 21 May 2026. Opened +20% above IPO price but profit-taking capped the close at ~+10%. Despite HPE data center hype, selling pressure weighed on closing performance. 85x OS demand was reflected in the open spike but not sustained.

⚠️ AVOID
Property sector is currently cold with low retail interest. High risk of 'Inspace' performance.
HISTORICAL OUTLIER: Massive performance pop that defied standard grading.

fundUse: Acquisition of 12 new container vessels, fleet expansion

analystInsight: HISTORICAL OUTLIER: Massive performance pop that defied standard grading.

fundUse: 60% R&D (IC Products & Silicon IP), 40% Infrastructure & EDA tools.
analystInsight:
🌟 MUST BUY (GRADE A)
Spectacular Main Market debut opening at RM3.50 (+297.7% premium) on 95.03x oversubscription. Closed its first day at RM2.21 (+151.14% premium). Solid Penang-based fabless IC chip designer with strong AI and high-performance computing tailwinds.
HISTORICAL OUTLIER: Massive performance pop that defied standard grading.
